texto: Sometimes the planning and the work is not the most difficult aspect of an endeavor; it’s the waiting—waiting to see if the preparation, the implementation, and the bait, will land a catch—waiting, that time in between the effort and the result, the source of so much hope, frustration, doubt, anxiety, and perhaps, disenchantment. It can try those with even the firmest resolve.
explicacao: Citação de Paul J. Bartusiak sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes the planning and the work is not the most difficult aspect of an endeavor; it’s the wai…” articula saude-mental, frustration, time em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
